Variables.Name: Description
Variables.Description: Name of Compression Scheme used for this asset

Variables.Name: bNeedsSkeleton
Variables.Description: Compression algorithms requiring a skeleton should set this value to true.

Variables.Name: TranslationCompressionFormat
Variables.Description: Format for bitwise compression of translation data.

Variables.Name: RotationCompressionFormat
Variables.Description: Format for bitwise compression of rotation data.

Variables.Name: ScaleCompressionFormat
Variables.Description: Format for bitwise compression of scale data.

Variables.Name: MaxCurveError
Variables.Description: Max error for compression of curves using remove redundant keys
